ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_km" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "area_miles" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city's center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city's center */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area_km" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "area_miles" REAL /* Total area of the country in square miles */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_capital_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population growth record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population record */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population for that year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the population */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area change record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the area change record */,
  "area_km" REAL /* Area in square kilometers for that year */,
  "area_miles" REAL /* Area in square miles for that year */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the area change */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the area change data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_changes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic indicator record */,
  "GDP" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "HDI" REAL /* Human Development Index */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Annual inflation rate */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the city */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation" (
  "transport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transportation infrastructure (e.g., subway, road) */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of infrastructure in kilometers */,
  "length_miles" REAL /* Length of infrastructure in miles */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the infrastructure was built */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the infrastructure */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update or maintenance */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transportation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic record */,
  "age_median" REAL /* Median age */,
  "age_0_14" INTEGER /* Population in the age group 0-14 */,
  "age_15_64" INTEGER /* Population in the age group 15-64 */,
  "age_65_plus" INTEGER /* Population in the age group 65 and above */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by ethnicity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "edu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the education record */,
  "schools_count" INTEGER /* Number of schools */,
  "students_count" INTEGER /* Number of students */,
  "teachers_count" INTEGER /* Number of teachers */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate in the city */,
  "higher_education_institutions" INTEGER /* Number of higher education institutions */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the education data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the healthcare record */,
  "hospitals_count" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals */,
  "doctors_count" INTEGER /* Number of doctors */,
  "nurses_count" INTEGER /* Number of nurses */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the city */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the city */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the healthcare data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the environmental record */,
  "green_spaces_km" REAL /* Area of green spaces in square kilometers */,
  "pollution_level" TEXT /* Level of pollution */,
  "waste_treatment_capacity" INTEGER /* Waste treatment capacity in tons per day */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index (AQI) */,
  "water_quality_index" INTEGER /* Water quality index */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the environmental data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "culture" (
  "culture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cultural record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the cultural record */,
  "museums_count" INTEGER /* Number of museums */,
  "theaters_count" INTEGER /* Number of theaters */,
  "festivals_count" INTEGER /* Number of festivals */,
  "cultural_events" INTEGER /* Number of cultural events per year */,
  "cultural_funding" REAL /* Annual funding for cultural activities */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the cultural data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("culture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_culture_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the report has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., view, edit, full access) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
